cards.description: San Francisco Curb Ramps dataset (~50K rows, 40 columns) from CRIS (Curb Ramp Information System)

cards.title: Data dictionary
cards.description: Data dictionary from DPW to understand field definitions

cards.title: No null rows
cards.description: No completely null rows found in the dataset - good data quality indicator

cards.title: Current and historical data
cards.description: Dataset includes both current and historical data with timestamp columns

cards.title: Identified column types (40 attributes)
cards.description: Numerical columns: conditionScore (0-100 scale), latitude/longitude coordinates. Boolean columns: curb ramp existence flags, accessibility features (detectableSurf, colorContrast, paintedRed). Categorical columns: surface condition (surfCond), vital facilities proximity (vitalFacilities), heavy traffic exposure (heavyTraffic), curb ramp possibility (crPossible). Temporal columns: multiple timestamp fields needing standardization. Location columns: street names, intersection identifiers, curb return data

cards.title: Missing data
cards.description: Missing data in various columns - need to determine how to handle (treat as zero? flag as unknown?)

cards.title: Inconsistent timestamp
cards.description: Inconsistent timestamp formats across different temporal columns
